_comment: vibe-kanban runtime config. baseUrl is resolved at startup via portFile. Run `npm run vibe-kanban` once, note the port logged to console, then update baseUrl here if auto-detection fails.
_setup_note: After first `npx vibe-kanban` run: (1) create a project via the UI, (2) run `npm run vibe-kanban:discover` to auto-populate projectId and defaultStatusId.
